name: Clear Stackable Shoe Box (Front-Open)
description: Clear plastic shoe box with front-opening drop door. Stackable design makes it easy to display and access your collection.

name: Clear Shoe Box with Magnetic Door
description: Magnetic front door for easy one-hand access. Fully transparent so you can find your shoes at a glance.

name: Compact Clear Shoe Box
description: Compact size perfect for everyday sneakers and flats. Stackable and space-efficient for any closet.

name: Wide Clear Shoe Storage Box
description: Extra width accommodates larger shoes and boots. Durable clear plastic construction with secure lid.

name: Medium Drop-Front Shoe Box
description: Medium-sized drop-front shoe box ideal for sneakers and casual footwear. Stacks securely with other boxes.

name: Slim Clear Shoe Box
description: Slim profile design maximizes vertical storage space. Crystal-clear visibility lets you identify contents instantly.

name: Tall Clear Shoe Storage Box
description: Taller box suitable for high-top sneakers and ankle boots. Reinforced corners for long-lasting durability.

name: Large Clear Shoe Box
description: Lightweight yet sturdy large shoe box. Great for bulkier footwear or storing multiple pairs of flats.

name: Mega Sneaker Display Box
description: Extra-large display box for premium sneakers and collector shoes. Showcases your best pairs with style.

name: 1-Tier Collapsible Shoe Rack
description: Single-tier collapsible shoe rack that folds flat for easy storage. Perfect for entryways and small spaces.

name: 2-Tier Collapsible Shoe Rack
description: Two-tier collapsible design holds up to 6 pairs of shoes. Folds flat in seconds when not in use.

name: 3-Tier Collapsible Shoe Rack
description: Three-tier rack for households with lots of footwear. Collapses neatly for travel or seasonal storage.

name: 4-Tier Collapsible Shoe Rack
description: Four-tier collapsible shoe rack holds up to 12 pairs. Sturdy construction with a compact folded profile.

name: 5-Tier Collapsible Shoe Rack
description: Five-tier rack for serious shoe collections. Maximizes vertical space while folding away effortlessly.

name: 6-Tier Collapsible Shoe Rack
description: Maximum capacity six-tier collapsible shoe rack. Ideal for large families or walk-in closets.

name: Clear Storage Container — Small
description: Compact clear storage container with lid, perfect for pantry staples like spices, snacks, and small dry goods.

name: Clear Storage Container — Medium
description: Medium-sized clear container with airtight lid. Keeps pasta, grains, and cereals fresh and visible.

name: Clear Storage Container — Large
description: Large capacity clear container ideal for bulk dry goods and pantry organization. Stackable design.

name: Storage Container with Lid Set — Medium
description: Medium container set with matching lids for a coordinated pantry look. BPA-free and food safe.

name: Storage Container with Lid Set — Large
description: Large container set with secure lids. Perfect for storing flour, sugar, rice, and other kitchen staples.

name: Slim Desk Organizer Tray — Mini
description: Slim mini tray for desk accessories, pens, and small items. Clean modern design fits any workspace.

name: Desk Organizer Tray — Standard
description: Standard flat organizer tray for drawer or desktop use. Keeps everyday items tidy and within reach.

name: Wide Organizer Tray
description: Wide flat tray for larger drawers or bathroom countertops. Great for makeup, toiletries, and accessories.

name: Deep Organizer Box
description: Deep-sided organizer box for bulkier items. Ideal for storing files, toys, craft supplies, or clothing.

name: Fridge Organizer Bin — Small
description: Slim fridge bin for organizing condiments, drinks, and small food items. Fits most refrigerator shelves.

name: Fridge Organizer Bin — Medium
description: Medium fridge bin keeps your refrigerator neat and easy to navigate. Pull-out handle for convenient access.

name: Fridge Organizer Bin — Large
description: Large-capacity fridge bin for storing produce, meal prep containers, and packaged foods.

name: Rotating Egg Holder
description: Space-saving rotating egg dispenser keeps eggs organized and accessible in your fridge.

name: Can Dispenser Organizer
description: Gravity-fed can dispenser automatically rolls cans to the front. Perfect for soda, canned food, and drinks.

name: Pull-Out Fridge Drawer — Small
description: Slide-out fridge drawer for easy access to items stored at the back of your refrigerator.

name: Pull-Out Fridge Drawer — Large
description: Large pull-out fridge drawer with extra width for deli items, produce, and meal prep containers.

name: Open-Top Storage Bin — Medium
description: Open-top storage bin for closets, shelves, and under-sink organization. Easy grab-and-go access.

name: Open-Top Storage Bin — Large
description: Large open-top bin ideal for toys, laundry, towels, and household clutter. Lightweight and durable.

name: Open-Top Storage Bin — XL
description: Extra-large open-top bin for bulky items like blankets, sports equipment, and seasonal goods.

name: Stackable Drawer Organizer — Small
description: Small stackable drawer divider for organizing cutlery, makeup, or office supplies. Mix and match sizes.

name: Stackable Drawer Organizer — Medium
description: Medium drawer organizer compartment. Modular design allows custom configurations for any drawer.

name: Under-Sink Organizer
description: Two-tier under-sink organizer maximizes cabinet space for cleaning supplies and toiletries.

name: Bathroom Countertop Organizer
description: Countertop organizer for bathroom essentials. Multiple compartments for skincare, makeup, and accessories.

name: Closet Clothes Hanger — Standard
description: Slim non-slip clothes hanger that saves up to 50% more space than traditional hangers.

name: Pants Hanger Clip
description: Sturdy clip hanger designed specifically for trousers and skirts. Adjustable clips prevent fabric creasing.

name: Velvet Clothes Hanger
description: Soft velvet coating prevents clothes from slipping. Ultra-thin profile maximizes closet space.

name: Kids Clothes Hanger
description: Child-sized hanger with smooth finish to protect delicate children's clothing. Sold in sets.

name: Heavy-Duty Coat Hanger
description: Reinforced coat hanger for heavy jackets, coats, and suits. Wide shoulder design maintains garment shape.

name: Space-Saving Cascading Hanger
description: Cascading hook allows multiple hangers to chain vertically, saving significant closet rod space.

name: Vacuum Storage Bag — Medium
description: Vacuum storage bag compresses bulky items like duvets and sweaters to a fraction of their original size.

name: Vacuum Storage Bag — Large
description: Large vacuum bag for comforters, blankets, and winter clothing. Double-zip seal prevents air re-entry.

name: Wall-Mount Key Holder
description: Wall-mounted key and mail organizer for entryways. Multiple hooks keep keys accessible and organized.

name: Stackable Shoe Rack — 2 Tier
description: Two-tier stackable shoe rack for entryways and closets. Holds up to 6 pairs of shoes.

name: Hanging Closet Organizer — 6 Shelf
description: Hanging shelf organizer attaches to closet rod for instant extra storage space. Six spacious compartments.

name: Laundry Hamper with Lid
description: Freestanding laundry hamper with removable lid. Ventilated sides keep laundry fresh between washes.

name: Shower Caddy Organizer
description: Adjustable tension pole shower caddy with four shelves. No drilling required — fits any bathroom.

name: Desktop File Organizer
description: Multi-tier desktop file organizer for documents, notebooks, and office supplies. Clean minimalist design.

name: Cable Management Box
description: Hides power strips and cable clutter in a clean enclosure. Side slots for easy cable routing.

name: Foldable Storage Cube — Small
description: Collapsible fabric storage cube for shelves and cube organizers. Folds flat for easy storage when empty.

name: Foldable Storage Cube — Large
description: Large collapsible storage cube for toys, books, and bulky items. Reinforced handles for easy carrying.

name: Bedside Caddy Organizer
description: Hangs on the side of your bed or sofa for easy access to remotes, phones, books, and glasses.

name: Over-Door Shoe Organizer
description: Over-door organizer with 12 clear pockets for shoes, accessories, or cleaning supplies.

name: Pantry Pull-Out Basket — Small
description: Wire pull-out basket slides smoothly for easy access to pantry items stored at the back of shelves.

name: Pantry Pull-Out Basket — Large
description: Large pull-out pantry basket for heavy canned goods, bottles, and produce. Full-extension slide.

name: Wall-Mounted Spice Rack
description: Wall-mounted spice rack holds up to 12 standard jars. Keeps countertops clear and spices within reach.

name: Bathroom Towel Ladder Rack
description: Freestanding ladder-style towel rack for bathroom or bedroom. Holds multiple towels without wall mounting.

name: Garage Storage Bin — Heavy Duty
description: Heavy-duty storage bin for garage, basement, and workshop. Stackable with secure snap-on lid.

name: Wardrobe Divider Set
description: Set of closet shelf dividers to separate and organize folded clothes by category. Easy clip-on installation.

name: Magnetic Whiteboard Organizer
description: Magnetic whiteboard with built-in organizer pockets for notes, reminders, and daily planning.

name: Shoe Cabinet with Flip Doors
description: Compact shoe cabinet with flip-down doors. Holds up to 12 pairs in a minimal footprint.

name: Multi-Purpose Basket Set — 3pc
description: Set of 3 woven-style storage baskets in small, medium, and large sizes. Versatile for any room in the home.

name: Woven Storage Basket with Handle
description: Sturdy woven basket with built-in handles for easy carrying. Great for laundry, toys, and blankets.

name: Clear Makeup Organizer
description: Multi-compartment clear acrylic makeup organizer for brushes, lipsticks, skincare, and more.

name: Rotating Makeup Tower
description: 360-degree rotating makeup organizer tower with multiple tiers for full product visibility and access.
